title: oberonia smisrae
intro: Oberonia smisrae, also known as the Smisra's Oberonia, is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats in India. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oberonia smisrae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Oberonia smisrae include infusions and decoctions, which are often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
